import { useState } from "react"; import Sidebar from "./Sidebar"; import { generateReport } from "../api/report"; export default function ReportGeneration() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ type: "Expense Report", category: "All Categories", startDate: "", endDate: "" }); const handleChange = (e) => { setForm({ ...form, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleGenerate = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); generateReport(form); }; return (
